prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime key visual of a faceless cyberpunk heroine standing full-body from a low-angle perspective in the center of a dark futuristic city canyon. The character has wild, voluminous silver-gray hair blown upward by energy, a deliberately obscured smooth blurred square over the face, and large metallic gold headphones over one ear. Outfit: exactly 6 visible clothing/accessory pieces — a loose translucent lavender-pink open coat whipping outward, a blue retro tourist T-shirt reading “Visit Palm Spring” with a small sunset motel graphic, high-waisted brown pleated trousers with rolled cuffs, a dark braided belt with gold buckle, white socks, and burgundy leather lace-up shoes. Pose: powerful upright stance with one hand in the trouser pocket, coat and hair floating as if gravity is distorted. Surround the character with an explosive vertical aura of cyan, turquoise, electric blue, and magenta plasma, with lightning filaments, glowing particle sparks, crystalline shards, floating rocks, and circular shockwave rings erupting from cracked ground at the feet. Background: deep black-blue neon alley or sci-fi city corridor with faint holographic panels and exactly 2 large glowing vertical kanji-like text elements, one on the left and one on the right, styled as cyan neon signs. Lighting is extreme backlight and rim light, with bloom, lens streaks, prismatic fragments, high contrast, and luminous energy reflections on clothing. Style: highly detailed modern anime illustration, cinematic composition, dynamic perspective, painterly rendering mixed with crisp linework, ultra vibrant cyberpunk fantasy energy, no frame, no watermark, no extra characters.
